race.comment: PEARL KING (6) can run well here second up. The fresh run over 1400m at Pakenham was good, off a long spell there but getting home nicely for second after settling back. He's lightly raced over from WA prior and profiles nicely out to 1600m here. STRANGETHINGDESIRE (4) won narrowly on debut at Geelong over 1325m, sent out a $12 chance but just able to lead and cling on. Harder now but he should only improve and the rise in trip will suit. SHE'S PRETTY RICH (2) will find this easier than some recent runs in town, she doesn't win many but this suits and she can figure. COULDTHISBETHEONE (1) has won two of his past three and looks to get a great run tracking the speed. No reason he can't win again. OLATUNDE (5) is racing well and has each-way claims.
